text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh? Have you started an Umastagram?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
…I was just looking. There are a lot of good
photos of the starry sky on there.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The stars, huh. You take photos
of the night sky too, don't you?
Aren't you gonna post them?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd rather not. That's not really my thing.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, true. You seem like the type to keep your
favorite things to yourself…♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Then don't hold back — share your pics
with us! Umasta is fun, you know!♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, for tags you could use… #Ayabe,
#SparklyMeteorShower, #OnceInALifetime,
and #StargazingGoals.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Stargazing… goals? …No, you know what,
I'm really okay with just looking.
